lyric: ["When I am down and; oh my soul,so wea-ry; When troubles; come and my heart burdened;; be Then,I am still; and wait here in the Si----lence;Un---til; you come and sit a while; with me,You raise me up,so I can stand on moun-tains;You rais me up,to walk on stor;my seas  I am strong;when I am on; your,shoul;ders you raise me up,to more than I can;be You raise me up,so I can stand on moun-tains;You rais me up,to walk on stor;my seas  I am strong;when I am on; your,shoul;ders you raise me up,to more than I can;be you raise me be you raise me up to more than I can; be ","每当我(心情)(低落);灵魂如此(疲惫)。;苦难来袭;我心承受煎熬。如是我会;在这里静静等待，直到你来与我陪坐一刻。;有你指引，使我能登上高山。有你指引，我力挽大海狂澜。有你依靠，;我是如此坚强。;有你指引，使我超越自己。;;有你指引，使我能登上高山。有你指引，我力挽大海狂澜。有你依靠，;我是如;此坚强。;有你指引，使我超越自己。;(有你)(指引)，;;;有你指引使我超越自己。"]
lyric_text: When I am down and oh my soul,so wea-ry When troubles come and my heart burdened be Then,I am still and wait here in the Si----lenceUn---til you come and sit a while with me,You raise me up,so I can stand on moun-tainsYou rais me up,to walk on stormy seas  I am strongwhen I am on your,shoulders you raise me up,to more than I canbe You raise me up,so I can stand on moun-tainsYou rais me up,to walk on stormy seas  I am strongwhen I am on your,shoulders you raise me up,to more than I canbe you raise me be you raise me up to more than I can be 每当我(心情)(低落)灵魂如此(疲惫)。苦难来袭我心承受煎熬。如是我会在这里静静等待，直到你来与我陪坐一刻。有你指引，使我能登上高山。有你指引，我力挽大海狂澜。有你依靠，我是如此坚强。有你指引，使我超越自己。有你指引，使我能登上高山。有你指引，我力挽大海狂澜。有你依靠，我是如此坚强。有你指引，使我超越自己。(有你)(指引)，有你指引使我超越自己。
